enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vaazhavudu?

The song Vaazhavudu conveys a message about living life to the fullest and embracing fun and positivity.

What is the plot context of the movie Dora?

Dora revolves around a young woman who embarks on a journey filled with adventure and challenges, making this song a perfect fit for its lively theme.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Sanjana Divaker and Vivek Siva.

Who composed the music for Vaazhavudu?

The music for Vaazhavudu was composed by the duo Vivek – Mervin.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 16, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Dora, the song Vaazhavudu serves as an anthem of joy and celebration. It encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth, encouraging listeners to embrace life and its adventures. The upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of happiness and energy, making it a perfect addition to any festive occasion. Overall, the song resonates with themes of positivity and fun, inviting everyone to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaazhavudu from Dora is a vibrant celebration of life that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With the dynamic vocals of Sanjana Divaker and Vivek Siva, paired with the catchy beats of Vivek – Mervin, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the fun and energy of this track that resonates with joy and positivity!
stanzaMeanings: Life is like a single vehicle, if you have faith, it will run.
Four people will talk, but don't get distracted by their words.
You and I are one here, living life is just for fun.
We believe in God, and we are a group, he watches over everything.
Vaazhavudu Vaazhavudu Vaazhavudu, don't think too much about time, just enjoy.
Vaazhavudu Vaazhavudu Vaazhavudu, give a little space for our vehicle to move.
You and I are one here, living life is just for fun.
We believe in God, and we are a group, he watches over everything.
Life is like a single vehicle, if you have faith, it will run.
Don't chase luck, stop working too hard, don't talk too much.
Don't think wrongly, don't make mistakes, even if things go wrong, don't get tense.
When speed breakers come, don't jerk around.
If we go slow for a while, it's not a mistake.
